payments.title: Payments economics
payments.description: Monitor net recognized platform fees with deterministic event-window traceability.
payments.sectionDescription: Primary economics headline derived from canonical payment events.
payments.primaryMetricDescription: Captured platform fees plus financial adjustments in the selected event window.
payments.currenciesDescription: Net recognized fee composition by source currency.
payments.adjustmentsDescription: Supporting adjustment postings grouped by adjustment code.
payments.traceabilityDescription: Source event-window and trace metadata used to compute this dashboard.
payments.sampleTracesEmpty: No trace references found in the selected window.
payments.emptyAdjustments: No financial adjustments were found for the selected window.

exposure.sectionDescription: Prioritize intervention by organizer and event risk clusters with trace-linked drilldowns.
exposure.emptyState: No debt or dispute exposure data was found for the selected window.

mxn.sectionDescription: Event-time FX snapshot conversion with preserved source-currency detail.
mxn.tableDescription: Each source currency retains original totals and snapshot references used for MXN conversion.
mxn.emptyState: No source-currency events were found for the selected window.

fx.sectionDescription: Maintain deterministic daily MXN rates and resolve missing or stale conversion data.
fx.upsertDescription: Rate updates require a reason and create immutable audit records.
fx.ratesTableDescription: Latest configured daily FX reference rates.
fx.emptyRates: No daily FX rates are configured yet.
fx.noActions: No missing or stale FX actions were detected for the selected window.

artifacts.sectionDescription: Run trace-scoped rebuild and resend operations with immutable lineage and audit evidence.
artifacts.formDescription: Operations are singleton-only in v1. Batch and date-range scopes are policy-denied.
artifacts.genericErrorMessage: Failed to refresh artifact governance records.
artifacts.recentVersionsDescription: Immutable rebuild lineage by trace and artifact version.

caseLookup.sectionDescription: Trace-centric lookup for support investigations using trace IDs and related transaction identifiers.
caseLookup.searchDescription: Search by trace ID, root entity ID, payout request ID, payout quote ID, or idempotency keys.
caseLookup.queryPlaceholder: trace:..., payout request ID, idempotency key...
caseLookup.noQueryState: Enter a trace ID or related transaction identifier to start lookup.
caseLookup.noResultsState: No matching financial cases were found for the provided identifier.
caseLookup.disambiguationDescription: When one identifier maps to multiple traces, use this grouping to disambiguate.
caseLookup.disambiguationEmpty: No ambiguous matches were detected for this lookup.
caseLookup.resultsDescription: Cases are grouped by trace with normalized identifier evidence and role-appropriate metadata.

evidence.sectionDescription: Generate a consolidated trace evidence pack with lifecycle, artifacts, and policy context.
evidence.requestDescription: Load a trace-centric evidence pack for support or trust review.
evidence.noTraceState: Select a trace ID to load the consolidated evidence pack.
evidence.notFoundState: No evidence pack data was found for the selected trace.
evidence.summaryDescription: Canonical trace history, key timestamps, and redaction metadata.
evidence.policyContextEmpty: No additional policy context was found for this trace.
evidence.eventsDescription: Canonical trace events used to build case evidence.
